programs.title: Death in Paradise
programs.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programs.title: Ludwig
programs.desc: John 'Ludwig' Taylor lives in solitude, devoting himself to creating puzzles.His twin brother, Chief Inspector James Taylor, disappears.Taylor decides to find him and takes over his identity to do so.

actor: Young John u0026 James Taylor - Jakub Bednarczyk

programs.title: Blue Lights
programs.desc: Young policemen start working at a police station in Belfast.They immediately face difficult tasks, as they fight drug-trafficking gangs, paramilitary organizations, secret agents and representatives of the local community who do not intend to comply.Officers are on the front line.They come into contact with people from different backgrounds - they have made bad decisions or are completely lost.For most of them, law enforcement officers primarily provide advice on how to get back on track.Meanwhile, the attention of the new employees is drawn to the sudden lull in the investigation conducted on many fronts into a local criminal group.

programs.title: My Life is Murder 3
programs.desc: The third installment of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry
